cards.back: A collaborative approach between researchers and the community being studied to develop solutions that are tailored to the specific needs and context
A collaborative approach where both researchers and stakeholders design solutions together, often using a iterative process
A research approach that focuses on creating and testing solutions to real-world problems, often using a systematic and methodical approach
An approach that prioritizes the needs and experiences of users when designing solutions, often using a human-centered design process
A policy approach that is informed by empirical evidence and rigorous research, often used to inform decisions about AI policy and regulation
